creator: wolman@cs.washington.edu
text:
The following patch upgrades the ical port to use a newer version
of tcl and tk.  The old port used tcl/tk v8.2, and this version
uses tcl/tk v8.3.  This patch depends on upgrading the tcl and tk
ports to version 8.3.2 - it won't work with tcl/tk 8.3.1.  Those
patches are contained in PR#25371 and PR#25372.

The patch can be downloaded from
http://www.cs.washington.edu/homes/wolman/patches/ical22.patch

Fix: 

n/a
How-To-Repeat: n/a
